title: imagebuildah: don't remove intermediate images if we need them
body: In multistage builds without caching, if an intermediate stage's image ended up being the final image (i.e., when the last instruction in the Dockerfile is a FROM instruction that references a previous stage), we would remove it when we finished building.  Fix that by modifying the cleanup logic to compare the ID of an image that it's about to delete to the final image's ID, if it has one, and skipping it if they match.
